text.title: csharp-dotnet Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for csharp-dotnet as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: async void for event handlers — silent crashes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One unhandled exception inside async void crashes the host. Force async Task.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Deadlock under sync context; agent code review must reject any sync-over-async.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Verify boot; MapperConfiguration.AssertConfigurationIsValid() in a unit test.

failure-mode.description: EF queries missing await on ToListAsync().
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: DbContext or other scoped service injected into BackgroundService constructor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: BackgroundService is singleton; scoped services throw at runtime on first use. Mandate IServiceScopeFactory pattern.

failure-mode.description: Migrations against shared dev/prod DB without human checkpoint.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Destructive — always pause before dotnet ef database update on shared DBs.

failure-mode.description: Source-generated mappers (Mapperly) missing partial class keyword.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent often forgets the partial keyword.
